chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-3125 of 2011 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of main case 27-02-2024 Mr. Iftikhar Ali Arain, Advocate along with petitioner. Mr. Shahriyar I. Awan, Assistant A.G. ***** Petitioner claims to be a Watchman in Education Department, appointed in terms of offer order dated 27.11.2010 on donation of a plot. His case is that he has not been paid salaries since 18.02.2011. As petitioner claims to be a civil servant and has brought before this Court an issue of his salaries, which comes within the terms and conditions of service. Hence, this petition is not maintainable and is accordingly dismissed. However, the petitioner would be at liberty to avail a proper remedy in accordance with law, if he is advised so, before the relevant forum. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
